question: Hello! How can I help you?
answer: Hey there! 👋 I'm Aura, your assistant at Theaurax.in — your go-to store for premium football jerseys! We have all the latest 25/26 season jerseys from top clubs and national teams. What are you looking for today? A specific team, player jersey, or just browsing? Let me know how I can help! ⚽🔥

question: Do you support Cash on Delivery (COD) or online payments?
answer: Yes, we support both Cash on Delivery (COD) and Online Payments (UPI, GPAY, PhonePe, Cards). For online payments, there is no extra charge. For COD, there is a flat extra fee of ₹50 charged by the courier partner. You can choose your preferred method at checkout on Theaurax.in.

question: What are the shipping charges and delivery timelines?
answer: We ship all across India! Shipping is FREE for all online prepaid orders. For Cash on Delivery (COD) orders, a flat fee of ₹50 applies. Delivery takes 3 to 5 business days for metro cities, and 5 to 7 business days for the rest of India. You will receive a tracking link via WhatsApp/SMS once your order is shipped.

question: What sizes do you have and is there a size chart?
answer: Our jerseys are available in sizes S, M, L, XL, and XXL. They are standard athletic/slim fit. We highly recommend checking our size chart on the website (https://theaurax.in/size-chart) to find your perfect fit. If you prefer a loose/relaxed fit, we suggest ordering one size up.

question: Can I customize the jersey with my own name and number?
answer: Yes! Customization (adding your name and favorite number on the back of the jersey) is available for an additional ₹100. During the checkout process on our website, you will see a text box to enter the Name and Number you want printed. Please note that customized jerseys cannot be returned or exchanged unless there is a manufacturing defect.

question: What is your return and exchange policy?
answer: We offer a 7-day exchange policy for size issues or defects. The jersey must be unused, with all tags intact. Please note custom-printed jerseys (with custom names/numbers) cannot be exchanged or returned. To start an exchange, message us here with your order details, or email support@theaurax.in with your order ID, reason, and photos (if the item is damaged or wrong).

question: What is the fabric quality and material of the jerseys?
answer: Our jerseys are premium master quality (1:1 replicated player/fan version jerseys). They are made of 100% high-grade polyester fabric with sweat-wicking dry-fit technology, complete with high-density embroidered brand logos and team crests. They look and feel exactly like the ones worn by players on the pitch.

question: Do you offer discounts for wholesale or bulk orders?
answer: Yes! We specialize in team kits and wholesale orders. For orders of 20 or more jerseys, we offer special wholesale pricing. Share the quantity you're looking for, or reach our wholesale team directly on 9884442049 for the best quote.

question: How can I track my order?
answer: Once your order ships, you'll get an update here on WhatsApp. If you'd like a status check anytime before that, just message us your order number and our team will look it up and update you directly.

question: Do you ship outside India?
answer: Right now we only ship within India. We don't currently support international orders, but keep an eye out — that may change in the future!

question: How should I wash and care for my jersey?
answer: For best results: cold hand wash or gentle machine wash (inside-out), no bleach, no wringing, and air dry in shade rather than direct sunlight. Avoid ironing directly over any printed name/number or crest — iron inside-out on low heat if needed. This keeps the print and fabric looking fresh for way longer!

question: Can I cancel my order?
answer: Message us as soon as possible with your order number! If it hasn't been packed/shipped yet, we'll do our best to cancel it for you. Once it's shipped, our standard 7-day exchange policy applies instead.

question: Do you have jerseys for kids?
answer: Yes! We carry kids/youth versions for a lot of our popular player jerseys. Just let us know the team or player you're looking for and we'll check what's available in kids sizing.

question: How do I contact Theaurax support?
answer: We're right here to help on WhatsApp — just tell us your issue and order number and we'll sort it out. 📩 For emails: support@theaurax.in. 🛒 Wholesale/bulk orders: 9884442049. Share your order ID and any photos (for damaged/wrong items) and we'll get you a resolution.
